chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3623 - وَ قَالَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِنَّ اَلرَّجُلَ لَيُنْفِقُ مَالَهُ فِي حَقٍّ وَ إِنَّهُ لَمُسْرِفٌ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3623 - Imam Ali ibn Al-Hussain (as) said:
"A man may spend his wealth on what is right, yet still be considered extravagant."
